title: Preparation of Frozen Bacteria Stock
author: Kenneth Schackart
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ba3bigin

steps.title: Add 150 µL sterile DMSO to sterile cryotube
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL sterile DMSO to sterile cryotube.

steps.title: Add 850 µL overnight culture to cryotube containing
steps.instruction: Add 850 µL overnight culture to cryotube containing.

steps.title: Vortex or invert repeatedly to mix
steps.instruction: Vortex or invert repeatedly to mix.

steps.title: Store cryotube in deep freezer (...
steps.instruction: Store cryotube in deep freezer ( -40 °C to -80 °C )

steps.title: Go to the frozen storage inventory...
steps.instruction: Go to the frozen storage inventory and add at a minimum the following information: Storage location Your name Date Organism identification
